加油吧！反正我个人是觉得这本书还不错的。[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733403010,"group_id":"7423295529108376600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写写写写！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxA992vc9Aaz2/kuBVQ+WGY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b519bcb6554b440db4df8319cd77c9bc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708890&x-signature=0PQ2sbR0z0p1wP1cRZLl3e2yAH4%3D","user_id":"50967279869","user_name":"光明慈悲巨成佛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50967279869","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423295529108376600","book_info":{"abstract":"（漫威，DC，灵笼，一人之下，鬼吹灯，龙族，生化危机，盗墓笔记，艾尔登法环，猎魔人，铁血战士，异形，美恐世界……大杂烩就大杂烩！
只要大家想看我就写，毕竟主角就应该是没有极限的！）
被泥头车撞死的罗杰获得了可以穿越到各个诸天世界的系统。
于是，怪物和恶棍们的克星出现了。
《荒野大镖客》中，他是令平克顿侦探和赏金猎人们闻风丧胆的西部死神。
经典恐怖电影《惊心食人族》中，望着不死不灭的食人恶魔，罗杰化身猎魔人，他挥舞银剑上前浴血奋战！——“来吧畜牲，我要把你的头挂在马鞍上！”
《环太平洋》世界中，巨浪轰击海岸，面对来势汹汹的开菊怪兽和周围已经熄火的巨型机甲，看着身后的万家灯火，罗杰掏出变身器——“这一次，我将以奥特战士形态出击！”
《龙族》世界里，看着那个永远长不大的死小孩，罗杰化身教育专家，在高空一脚路明非从直升机上踹了下去——“小子，如果不想死的话，就给我高高飞起来吧！”
《漫威》中，他是九头蛇的新任领袖，灭霸的死敌！
《流浪地球》中，他是光之使者，引领人类找到全新的家园……
无限的世界，无限的可能！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obecc3fde2a44dfeb33dd91939a152b39~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鹍山","author_id":"","book_id":"7423295529108376600","book_name":"诸天，从惊心食人魔开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1020人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7425565250570682904","read_count":"1020","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"203538"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.9","serial_count":"99","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,诸天万界,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/4f4c96b6aa1c43581dc0fbafe8664430~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301674&x-signature=Lo4wQHg%2BrXUpaEY0iFzBsnoRTds%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"176392840943831","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"57"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202275302844FE56AA2DB6A2DB9"}"},"relate
